entry.title: Re: Error no. L9029 is raised during qRFC processing from...
entry.content:
Dominik, check recommendation in the note https://me.sap.com/notes/3482008/E

 

I mean SAP reccomends manual entry in V_T156SY and V_156SC_VC

entry.title: Re: Deprecated class de.hybris.platform.webservicescommon...
entry.content:
Yes, you are right. The sanitize() method in YSanitizer is different from the one in the Sanitizer class, but it seems that the OOTB code is using Sanitizer.sanitize() as a replacement. You can see the following classes as examples from the commercewebservices extension:

  • DefaultContextInformationLoader class under de.hybris.platform.commercewebservices.core.context.impl package
  • BaseSiteMatchingFilter class under de.hybris.platform.commercewebservices.core.v2.filter package
  • CartsController class under de.hybris.platform.commercewebservices.core.v2.controller package

First line of both methods are the same

StringUtils.defaultString(input).trim()

 After this line, YSanitizer class first removes all CRLF chars with space

CRLF.matcher(output).replaceAll(" ")

And after that calls escapeHtml method of org.apache.commons.lang.StringEscapeUtils. This method replaces some special chars with their HTML names (e.g. € becomes €)

StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml(output)

However, after first line, Sanitizer class only removes the chars between 0-31 and 127-159 with the following line

CharMatcher.javaIsoControl().removeFrom(trimmed)

Since it removes the chars in the range from the string, CRLF chars (10 and 13) are also removed.

I wrote a simple Groovy to see the differences between to sanitize methods, you can also test it on HAC and see the differences:

import de.hybris.platform.util.Sanitizer
import de.hybris.platform.util.Utilities
import de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.util.YSanitizer


StringBuilder chars = new StringBuilder();
for(char i = 0; i < 200; i++){
    chars.append("Char #");
    chars.append((int) i);
    chars.append(": ");
    chars.append(i);
    chars.append(System.lineSeparator());
}

String charsStr = chars.toString();
String ySanitized = YSanitizer.sanitize(charsStr);
String sanitized = Sanitizer.sanitize(charsStr);
String apacheLangHtmlEscapedAfterSanitized = org.apache.commons.lang.StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml(sanitized);
String apacheTextHtmlEscaped3AfterSanitized = org.apache.commons.text.StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml3(sanitized);
String apacheTextHtmlEscaped4AfterSanitized = org.apache.commons.text.StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml4(sanitized);
String utilitiesHtmlEscapedAfterSanitized = Utilities.escapeHTML(sanitized);

println(charsStr);
println("YSanitizer.sanitize(): " + ySanitized)
println("Sanitizer.sanitize(): " + sanitized)
println("lang.StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml(): " + apacheLangHtmlEscapedAfterSanitized)
println("text.StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml3(): " + apacheTextHtmlEscaped3AfterSanitized)
println("text.StringEscapeUtils.escapeHtml4(): " + apacheTextHtmlEscaped4AfterSanitized)
println("Utilities.escapeHTML(): " + utilitiesHtmlEscapedAfterSanitized)

 Hope this clarifies the difference between two classes

entry.title: Re: Upload account statement MT940 incorrect
entry.content:
Hi Stanco,

28C is a Bank statement number and It seems your MT940 file has multiple bank statements in single file. You can upload multiple bank statements in single MT940 file but make sure 28C is different for each line. Also it should be different from your existing uploaded bank statement number as same number cant be uploaded again.

Please check and upload, it should work.

Regards

Vijaykumar

entry.title: How sovanta uses Joule Studio to take ticketing systems to the next level
entry.content:
Real-World Use Case with SAP Joule Studio

In an era where efficiency and intelligent automation are critical, SAP has introduced Joule – a powerful AI assistant that is redefining the way users interact with SAP systems. But what do real-world use cases look like when it comes to optimizing business processes and supporting employees across departments? As an early-stage adopter of Joule Studio, sovanta put the GenAI tool through its paces. From Extension to Integration to AI – sovanta has been consulting and supporting SAP customers in the cloud environment for 15 years and has developed into a specialized SAP BTP partner. Thanks to our experienced BTP, UX, AI, and Development experts, we have established ourselves as a reliable BTP implementation partner, focusing on innovative, easy-to-use and AI-powered business apps that semelssly integrate with various systems.

Bringing together our SAP and AI experience, we successfully implemented the first use case with Joule Studio. The result? An exciting use case in the Center domain. In this blog post, we’ll explore the background of that use case and how our clients can benefit from Joule going forward.

Joule Studio in SAP Build: What It Can Do

First things first: We took a deep dive into Joule Studio within SAP Build, and we’re excited by what we found. The combination of generative AI and deep integration into SAP systems already makes Joule a powerful tool for our clients. But the real magic happens with the addition of Custom Joule Skills via Joule Studio. These enable truly impactful use cases that can make a tangible difference for businesses.

A particularly interesting aspect – and challenge – is Joule’s chat history. Joule automatically logs conversations to autonomously select the appropriate skill for follow-up questions. However, it heavily depends on the descriptions of each skill to correctly trigger them. As Joule Studio pioneer, we observed that Joule occasionally struggles to trigger the most relevant skill for certain follow-ups. By fine-tuning our skill descriptions, we were able to significantly improve precision and context handling. We are excited to see that SAP is actively working to enhance Skill Matching capabilities, and partner feedback like ours is directly shaping the ongoing evolution of Joule Studio’s intelligence.

The Use Case: Ticketing System Integration

To fully explore Joule Studio’s potential, we developed a realistic use case focused on service centers. This scenario showcases how Joule can retrieve service case information by integrating with an external ticketing system and leveraging Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) for contextual insights. This allows users to instantly access relevant ticket data and receive solution recommendations based on similar past cases – even without relying on Joule’s Document Grounding capabilities, which were not yet available during our early adopter experience.

The Business Challenge

When a customer reports an issue with a product, service teams are confronted with a lot of challenges:

  • Understanding the specifics of the incoming service case, extracting key information from it
  • Quickly finding internal documents that may be relevant to the customer issue
  • Checking if a similar issue was previously reported or resolved

All of these actions require the service team to navigate between various different systems, having to copy and paste information and search terms across these.

The Solution and its Key Benefits

This is where the power of Joule Studio and its ability to connect Joule with various systems comes in handy. Making full use of custom skills, we connected:

  • A ticketing system (e.g., JIRA) via API to retrieve and update service tickets.
  • The sovanta GenAI DocumentChat via API to perform RAG using historical case data.
    Good to know: While native RAG orchestration via Document Grounding is still evolving, Joule Studio already makes it easy to integrate external RAG services through APIs as part of a custom Joule Skill. In our case, we demonstrated how external RAG can be connected— using the sovanta GenAI DocumentChat to bring additional context and insights into the conversation.

We allow Joule to interact with these systems via three separate Joule Skills:

  • Skill 1: Search Tickets: Allows Joule to search for specific Tickets in the ticketing System.
  • Skill 2: Find Past Solutions: Use RAG via a context in the Document Chat that contains past solutions.
  • Skill 3: Update Ticket: Allows Joule to update a specific ticket in the ticketing System.

The flow below shows how these skills work together in a real conversation.

Separating the new Joule skills helps make each step in the process more reliable and easier to control. By keeping actions like searching tickets, finding solutions, and updating cases separate, we make sure Joule picks the right skill depending on the user’s request. This approach also ties closely to the importance of good skill descriptions: when each skill is focused and clearly described, Joule can match follow-up questions much more accurately. It keeps the conversation flow smooth and gives us the flexibility to tweak or improve individual skills later without disrupting the whole setup.

This use case shows how a custom Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) service can already be effectively integrated with Joule Studio, even without native support. As a result, support teams benefit from context-aware, AI-generated responses that boost efficiency and improve the overall customer service experience. By instantly retrieving and analyzing ticket data, Joule enables significantly faster issue resolution. It also supports proactive problem-solving by suggesting solutions based on similar past cases.

Future of AI Agents in Joule Studio

Looking ahead, building AI Agents within Joule Studio will be a key next step. As participants in the SAP Alpha Program for AI Agents, we already see strong potential to extend our use case even further. In the future, AI Agents could completely take over first-level support activities such as autonomously requesting additional information, suggesting possible solutions and reacting to further feedback by customers.

This will also require handling ticket escalations efficiently. In many service centers, one common challenge is identifying when a support ticket needs to be escalated. Service agents often have to manually decide if an issue is urgent enough to involve higher-level support, which can lead to delays or missed escalations. With large ticket volumes, it’s easy for critical issues to get lost among routine cases. AI Agents in Joule Studio could help by proactively monitoring tickets for escalation triggers and forwarding those tickets to the correct second- or third level support experts — taking service center efficiency to the next level. 

Our Final Thoughts on Joule Studio

Joule Studio is proving to be a promising addition to the SAP ecosystem. With the ability to extend capabilities using Custom Skills and integrate external services like sovanta GenAI DocumentChat, it offers a flexible and future-proof way to enhance business processes. Integrating Joule with AI Agents will open up exciting possibilities for realizing advanced use cases within Joule Studio, taking full advantage of multi-skill orchestration and autonomous task planning and handling. At sovanta, we’re excited to continue exploring how our clients can benefit from SAP Joule – today and in the future.

entry.title: Time Forms
entry.content:
Is it possible to create a absence statement with a column of worklfow approver and workflow status. The requirement is that an employee has to hand over a form with the absences to a union before going on holiday etc. I immedately thought of time forms since reports can also cover this topic but the customer asked specific about this option.
If it is possible how has the template and the mapping look like?

entry.title: Re: Release SiteLogisticsRequest with OData in ByD
entry.content: Hello. Can you show your payload please?

entry.title: "IS ASSIGNED" doesn't work after dynamic ASSIGN (in a loop)
entry.content:
I have the below piece of code, I expect that the field symbol is not assigned for the component ATRIBUT (the component doesn't exist), but it says it's assigned, with the value of the previous component ID:

REPORT zdemo.
CLASS ltc_is_assigned_wrong_usage DEFINITION FINAL
  FOR TESTING RISK LEVEL HARMLESS DURATION SHORT.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    METHODS test FOR TESTING RAISING cx_static_check.
ENDCLASS.

CLASS ltc_is_assigned_wrong_usage IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD test.
    TYPES:
      BEGIN OF ty_object,
        id        TYPE c LENGTH 10,
        attribute TYPE c LENGTH 10,
      END OF ty_object.
    DATA(object) = VALUE ty_object( id        = 'Value-ID'
                                    attribute = 'Value-Attr' ).
    DATA(component_names) = VALUE string_table( ( `WRONG` ) ( `ID` ) ( `ATRIBUT` ) ( `ATTRIBUTE` ) ).
    DATA(result) = VALUE string( ).
    LOOP AT component_names INTO DATA(component_name).
      ASSIGN COMPONENT component_name OF STRUCTURE object TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<component>).
      IF <component> IS ASSIGNED. "<===== doesn't work well ???
        result = result && |{ component_name } value: { <component> }\n|.
      ELSE.
        result = result && |{ component_name } not assigned\n|.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.
    cl_abap_unit_assert=>assert_equals( 
          act = result
          exp = |WRONG not assigned\n|
             && |ID value: Value-ID\n|
             && |ATRIBUT value: Value-ID\n| "<==== I expect ATRIBUT not assigned
             && |ATTRIBUTE value: Value-Attr\n| ).
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

Why does "IS ASSIGNED" return true for the non-existing component name ATRIBUT?

Thank you.

Sandra

entry.title: SAC - Errors When Updating Public Dimension
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working with a public dimension in SAP Analytics Cloud that has more than 14 data imports from different sources. Recently, I started encountering errors during the data import jobs — this likely started happening after the latest system update.

The error message is:

An unexpected error occurred while trying to update the dimension data.
Correlation ID: 621009E0-8AF8-47A4-8190-BD64F20E8A1156

Previously, everything was working fine.

This isn’t the first time I’ve faced this issue. In the past, I had to recreate all the imports, which resolved the issue. However, I'd prefer a more sustainable solution.

Has anyone else experienced this?
Is there a known reason or fix for this issue — preferably something that doesn’t require recreating all the imports every time?

Thanks in advance for your help!

Michalis

entry.title: Request for Guidance on SAP PS (Public Cloud) for Construction Industry
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am newly working with the SAP PS (Project System) module in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud environment. I would appreciate any suggestions or best practices specifically for implementing SAP PS in the construction industry.

Key Points:

I am using Enterprise Projects – Project with Revenue, WBS Elements

If you have any relevant materials, documentation, or guidance that could help, please share.

Thank you for your support.

Best regards,
Venkatesh
PS Consultant

entry.title: Re: CAP - Creating multiple draft enabled entities by cod...
entry.content: If just need to insert entries and don't need `Draft workflow` there is a bypass draft setting. Alternatively this setting can be set on entity level with `@odata.draft.bypass` annotation.

entry.title: Re: "IS ASSIGNED" doesn't work after dynamic ASSIGN (in a...
entry.content:
Be very careful. ASSIGN ... TO <FS> does not unassign the field symbol <FS> if ASSIGN fails, <FS> keeps its previous assignment.

If you use or see code containing "IS ASSIGNED". As a rule of thumb, the result will be wrong.

IS ASSIGNED can work only if the field symbol is assigned only once in its scope (i.e. a local field symbol assigned once in its method, function module or subroutine, a global field symbol assigned once when running a program or function group...) If it's needed to check the result of ASSIGN later, use "ASSIGN ... IF sy-subrc <> 0 .... UNASSIGN <fs>" (or ASSIGN ELSE UNASSIGN (*)) and you may then later use "IF <fs> IS ASSIGNED".

To avoid any issue, always use "IF sy-subrc = 0" after a Dynamic ASSIGN, i.e. after any ASSIGN which modifies SY-SUBRC:

  • ASSIGN COMPONENT
  • ASSIGN with variable inside parenthesis "(variable)"
  • ASSIGN with text literal inside parenthesis "('VARNAME')"
  • ASSIGN itab[ ... ]
  • ASSIGN (clif_name)=>(variable)...

Only few ASSIGN don't change SY-SUBRC, when it's sure to always be successful, in that case no need to test that the field symbol is assigned, it's assigned for sure. These forms are rarely used, often when used to refer to one variable among few of the same type (e.g. IF condition then ASSIGN var1 TO <fs> else ASSIGN var2 TO <fs>).

  • ASSIGN dobj
  • ASSIGN struc-comp
  • ASSIGN obj->attr
  • etc.

(*) EDIT: ASSIGN ... ELSE UNASSIGN exists since ABAP 7.57.

EDIT: could anyone find an example for the SAP statement "If a static assignment is not successful"? Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Moving Q-stock between Plants
entry.content: Hi Raghavan. Thank you for this option. The valid business process is: 1.post q-stock from production, 2.immediately move to another plant, 3.perform inspection on another plant. What you are suggesting is very complicated workaround.

entry.title: Re: Is it Possible to Edit the Email Body of a BTM Task Subject?
entry.content: In SAP Business ByDesign, it is not currently possible to directly edit the subject or body of the email message that is automatically generated for a Business Task Management (BTM) task 1. Workaround: If you need to customize the content of email notifications, you can use Workflow Rules as an alternative. Workflow Rules allow you to: Define specific conditions under which emails are triggered. Customize the email content, including subject and body. Target specific recipients based on business logic. This approach gives you more flexibility and control over the communication triggered by business events.

entry.title: SAP Energy Park: Launch of New Use Cases
entry.content:
The SAP Energy Park continues to stand as a role model of innovation, showcasing how customers can lead the way in the energy transition through cutting-edge technology and data-driven solutions.

Now part of the SAP Experience Center in Walldorf, the Energy Park is introducing two compelling new use cases that emphasize SAP’s commitment to shaping a sustainable future: Sustainable Energy Monitoring  and the evolution of the Energy Community .

Sustainable Energy Monitoring

This new use case offers a comprehensive, real-time overview of the energy landscape across the SAP Walldorf campus. By seamlessly integrating data from buildings, solar panels, EV chargers, and power plants through SAP Business Data Cloud, it enables advanced visualization and dynamic energy mapping.

Powered by intelligent forecasting algorithms, the system can predict consumption scenarios—empowering users to make proactive, informed decisions. This supports customers in stepping into the role of Energy Portfolio Managers, which enables them to optimize operations and shape a more resilient, sustainable energy future. Watch the video

Energy Community

The Energy Community use case displays an important shift from energy consumption to active participation in energy production. Through collaboration between the S.MART Shop and its neighbors, SAP is building a shared energy ecosystem—where energy is not only managed more efficiently but also shared, and reinforcing community-based sustainability.

By enabling prosumer engagement and fostering energy exchange, this initiative redefines how energy is sourced, stored, and circulated within a collaborative environment. Watch the video

By introducing these two new use cases, the SAP Energy Park evidences the future of energy management today—demonstrating how SAP embraces the energy transition with solutions that drive efficiency and sustainability.

Last week, the team gathered at the SAP Experience Center in Walldorf for a collaborative Storyteller Enablement session, further amplifying the impact of these innovations.

Interested in a tour? Request your visit here. 

Discover more SAP Energy Park use cases in blog post and explore the full range of stories in our newly launched app.

entry.title: The SAP GUI menu does not respond anymore.
entry.content:
My colleague has the following problem with his SAP GUI:
He can no longer click on any menu. For example, when he clicks on “Extras” in the menu bar, nothing happens.

However, when he uses the keyboard shortcut ALT+a, via his keyboard, the menu item opens:

His SAP GUI version:

entry.title: Re: Authorization Issue but the user already have the authorization on their profile
entry.content: So, it's solved now? If your question is why, the reason is possibly the use of the authorization buffer (user profile auth/new_buffering). See SAP notes and SAP library for more information.

entry.title: Re: Subledger Source Document Type in Journal Entry Query
entry.content: Hi Felipe OJDT BaseRef and TransType are showing Numbers. Is there any way to display AP Invoice transaction Origin as PU?

entry.title: Re: Error no. L9029 is raised during qRFC processing from...
entry.content:
Hi @AlexPh and @DominikTylczyn !

surprisingly, for reverse-Kitting, another entries for 601/ / / / / were necessary, not mentioning the 101 entries for kit receipt movements.

Thank you @AlexPh for the mentioned Note, I have not found it before. My solution was based on debugging, as usual, about 1 year ago... The Note is rather new, so it is probable SAP will incorporate these missing entries in the next releases automatically. So it is rather a description of temporary workaround IMHO.

entry.title: Re: Permission for adjusting Workflow Steps of a not assi...
entry.content:
Hi Alex,

you could check in the User Policy Group the permissions for SERVICEASSIGNMENTSTATUS and adjust there the Permissions to create:OWN ; read:ALL; update:OWN; delete: NONE - hope this helps.

Best regards

Bernhard

entry.title: Performance issue on goal plan after conversion
entry.content:
Hello, I would need the support of an expert or someone who has encountered this problem and solved it.
After the update planned by SAP, it was necessary to carry out the conversion of both development and goal plans.
The development one has been converted correctly and works.
The goal plan, on the other hand, is converted correctly but when you launch a card and the manager tries to add a goal in the goal setting phase, the error reported in the attached screenshoot comes out.

From what I understand, the conversion is about changing the length of the text fields that, before the release, did not need to be setted.
I want to try and figure out what’s wrong and why the system sends me this error when I try to add a goal.

Thank you for helping me solve the problem.

entry.title: Re: Field functional area is only display in CJXX even if...
entry.content: Dear Tobias,

entry.title: Exchange Rate Integration with Bloomberg in SAP S4 HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Could you please suggest what is the best way to consume/Transfer the data from CPI to S4C system. The standard solution is SAP MRM. But this SAP MRM is the Paid version i mean its subscription based. As of now the client has to load the exchange rates for 4 currency pairs only. In On-Premises system we have the same set up to consume/Transfer the data to S4 HANA with IDoc (IDOC Message type: EXCHANGE_RATE). This IDoc message type is not supporting in the Private Cloud version. 

If anyone works on the same requirement in the Private Cloud, please suggest the solution for exchange rate automation with Bloomberg. Any standard API's is suitable for this requirement.

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

Ganesh.

entry.title: Re: Subject : My requirement is Excel file upload in Buil...
entry.content:
No need for custom code, you can just use this component:

https://spreadsheet-importer.com/

Live Demo:

https://livedemo.spreadsheet-importer.com/launchpad.html#Shell-home

entry.title: Re: Field Scope Blank for Start Mass Processing - Customer
entry.content:
Hello,

I had the same problem but not with a standard field but a specific one. To resolve the issue, I added some configuration in MDCIMG. 

 

Add your table on "Table setting" and after your fields

 

There is a note that explains what to do :

https://me.sap.com/notes/3444221/E

 

I know the problem is old, but if anyone comes across the topic and has the same problem I had this year, maybe this can help.

 

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Target field exposure for Substitution rule in F4406 for journal entries
entry.content: Hi Fernanda,

entry.title: How to upload documents in bulk using a background job - Document information Extraction
entry.content:
hi guys,

Could you let me know if there's an option to upload documents to Document Information Extraction via a batch job or another tool/program, in a more automated way than uploading document by document manually by a user? And if yes, how to achieve this?

I have a case where I will receive hundreds of scanned documents every day (purchase orders) in a specific folder, from which a job or program should pick them up one by one and try to upload them to Document Information Extraction (DIE).

best,

Ewa

entry.title: Re: Migration of received down payments
entry.content: After manual posting of the down payment, how can we clear this down payment then? Because the down payment is already paid by the customer in the old system.

entry.title: Re: 免费销售订单，交货单过账时进费用科目
entry.content:
Hello @michael_mx ,

目前在公有云版本中，通过不同的销售订单计划行绑定不同的移动类型的配置点暂未开放。可以考虑是否使用类似于成本中心领用的方式实现客情免费的物料领用，进入对应的销售费用的成本中心。

Kind Regards,

entry.title: Re: Outbound communication from SAP Public cloud to a Web...
entry.content: Hi Ulrich, thanks for the update. I have already thought that it cannot be done with the http-proxy because of the abstract communication layer in the SAP Public Cloud. In the meanwhile i have realized the scenario by using a outbound HTTP service and cloud connector to reach the server on the company site (i cannot open the port in the firewall). The only difference is i have switched to a HTTP server on the company side so i am not using the BC. However, because we are actually analyzing different possibilities i will also set up the scenario as you described with the BC. For now we are using the JCo for inbound communication to the cloud and we have a HTTP server for getting the outbound calls from the cloud. I will write an update when i have set up and tested the BC scenario that you have described. Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Field functional area is only display in CJXX even if...

Dear Tobias,

Thank you for your answer.

Functional area at WBS screen group is also set to input as the below picture.

Regards, 

Rewadee

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Performance OnePager
entry.content:
@thomas_fery 

Hi Thomas, can you please check SAP Analytics Cloud - System Overview | Fact Sheet | Connection.
I'm analyzing by which models a particular live connection is used. When a select an object in the table in the "Used By" logic group and I click on Fact Sheet, I'm getting a message "Please select one table entry".

When I click on Overview, Security > Users opens.

entry.title: No authorization to download Analysis Office Support Packages
entry.content:
One of the users is having a problem with Analysis for Office. When entering the link and following the steps, a message appears saying "You are not authorized to use this application" but they were unable to find a way to release this access.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: No authorization to download Analysis Office Support...
entry.content:
You can check in your company's licensed product list and see if you could find Analysis Office. Because only the licensed products will be displayed in the list. The detailed steps to reach your company's licensed product list, please refer to KBA 2484120 How to check all your company's licensed products - SAP for Me.

If you don't find Analysis Office from the list, very possible that your company does not have the relevant license. Then you need to contact your local SAP contract department as per KBA 1660069 or your SAP Account Manager as per KBA 2626344. The contract team and your SAP account manager should be able to help you further with such licensing/contractual issue.

If you have a valid license, but still cannot download this file, please create a case under component XX-SER-FORME for checking this download issue in further.

entry.title: Re: Working with RAP BO Events end-to-end - Event-driven-architecture - Event framework
entry.content:
Hi again @jitendra_it 

If you get a RAP BO delivered by SAP including events, you can be sure the event is triggered always. So yes, it does not matter if VA01 is run, the respective Fiori app, if a BAPI is called, if an API is called, if EML is used etc. etc. That is sort of the point of events; to trigger when a state-change occurs, regardless how the state-change occurred 😊

BR,

Melanie

entry.title: Re: Error no. L9029 is raised during qRFC processing from...
entry.content: @martinprokop, you're welcome! I have a small question about reverse-kitting. When we create vas order for reverse-kitting with batch mangament (+serial numbers) for header and components, we faced with a problem in the method VAL_PROD_BATCH and vas order was not created (error /scwm/vas302). Have you ever created vas orders with batch and serials numbers?

entry.title: Receipt document in disassembly order in SAP B1
entry.content:
Hello,  if i make disassembly order in SAP B1 and order completion,  then the issue for production document is automatically made, but the receipt from production document is not made.  But if i check the inventory posting list, the receipt of the component is made . 

Is this normal ?   Then is there any reason for not automatically generating the receipt from production document by the completion of disassembly order ?

entry.title: Re: What's New in SAP Master Data Governance, cloud edition 2505?
entry.content:
Hi Erik,

Please not that cloud-ready mode in MDG refers to various MDG product versions (incl., for example, MDG, cloud edition or MDG on SAP S/4HANA as of release 2023. And when using cloud-ready mode, the central governance is not based on the change request (which is used in classic mode). For de-central maintenance scenarios, there is SOAP integration (as outlined, for example, in my blog about the 2305 release).

entry.title: Re: Supplier or Customer Master Data Upload using Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Hello there,

Thanks for the detailed steps.

Wondering if we can control the FLVN00 and FLVN01 valid from date?

By using the CSV file, the system seems to take today's date as the "Valid From" date, even though the Define Settings for Legacy Data Transfer has been set to a different date.

Has anyone ever encountered the problem? If so, how did you resolve it? 

Thanks,
Sunny

entry.title: SAP BDC Demo Environment
entry.content:
Hello All, 

Since the BDC trial version is now available, I’d like to create a demo using it. Could you please guide me on how to enable or build the content? Also, is it possible to showcase a demo using standard content, considering that the source systems are not properly maintained? I’m looking for any way to effectively pitch it to clients. I’m exploring options to work exclusively within BDC, Datasphere, and SAC—without involving S/4HANA. The practice source systems are not properly maintained, making it impractical to establish connections with them. However, intelligent applications or insight apps require both source and target systems to be connected in order to enable the content. How can I execute the end to end cycle

entry.title: Consolidation Monitor (new) is not visible after upgrade to 2502.03
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am not able to view the consolidation monitor (New) F7271 after upgrade to 2502.03 but consolidation monitor (old) is visible. Checked the roles also which are assigned to the user id but still can see the app in. Below is the screenshot of the app assigned to role. Is there any other activity to be done?

Thanks and Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Custom calculation of coverage (similar to Days of Supply) in telescopic planning
entry.content:
Hi experts.

I wanna use custom calculation for specific stocks based on coverage similar what IBP offers with Safety Days of Supply in telescopic planning horizon.

The issue comes up when planning and switching from daily level to weekly and so on.

So, two things to be considered

1. number of days in days falls in the middle of the week - how to make it meaningful in planning results? In order to align with the stocks and demands proportionally? 

2. stocks calculated should be considering last period aggregation on aggregated weekly level - how to configure that? 

So same KF on daily planning takes daily values when planning on weeks should take LPA not sum/avg.

lets say we have 

Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun

8       8     8                                 Coverage ends on Wednesday

20    30   10    40   20  20  20     Stock considered for next week should be 20

1500                                           Dependent demand is 1500 on weekly level but coverage is only 3 days a week

Any ideas?

Thank you!

SAP Integrated Business Planning for inventory

entry.title: BMK – Return to Supplier - no outbound delivery created
entry.content:
Dear Community,

After a negative usage decision in QM, a returns purchase order with outbound delivery to the vendor is to be created. A Z-document type (ZNB) is used in the purchasing document. The shipping tab does not appear.

The warning message “No delivery type for returns processing assigned to item 00010” appears.

The procedure for system administration describes the steps from an on-premise / private cloud system. However, this customizing step is not provided in the public cloud.

An outbound delivery for purchase orders due for delivery cannot be created.

 

A Ticket has already been created. However, the suggested SAP-Note 2958447 does not solve the issue. All criteria of the solution in this note are met, but the shipping tab does not appear and the subsequent outbound delivery cannot be created.

 

Can you suggest on a solution?

 

Many thanks in advance and kind regards

Talke

entry.title: Clean Core and RISE with SAP: a Partnership for Business Performance and Growth
entry.content:
Competitive markets demand quick responses to changes both within business processes and the information systems that assist them. Oil companies face fluctuating costs; systems not accommodating these variations risk negatively impacting their core business. Systems agility, which corresponds to having a responsive IT structure adaptable to evolving business demands, is a crucial part of organizational performance.

Amidst this complexity, the "Clean Core" concept emerges as a beacon of clarity and effectiveness. Clean Core is a system architecture concept that prioritizes maintaining a system in a state that is easily upgradable. This approach ensures the system remains close to its original, unmodified state, allowing seamless updates and upgrades while integrating cloud-compliant extensions and integrations. Beyond the technical framework, the Clean Core embodies a mindset that helps organizations streamline operations, enhance agility, and unlock growth opportunities.

The Five Dimensions of a Clean Core

  1. Optimize Business Processes: Optimize workflows to maintain competitiveness while minimizing complexity.
  2. Ensure Extensibility: Ensure effective upgrade-stable extensions and decoupled from SAP standard functionalities.
  3. Secure Clean Data: Secure clean data and data quality governance to unleash its full potential while minimizing errors.
  4. Build Integration: Build a reliable landscape leveraging standard and modern APIs and an event-driven design.
  5. Adhere Operations: Adhere to best practice operations concepts including monitoring and suitable release management.

Customizing is mainly done in large enterprises to streamline business processes and enhance user experience. However, it creates complexity that needs to be effectively managed. This complexity applies to various aspects such as implementations, maintenance, upgrades, and updates. Therefore, it is important for customizing to be standardized to ensure efficient management and operation. This emphasizes the necessity of Clean Core, which prioritizes to maintain systems close to their original state to enable easier updates and integration of extensions.

An integral part of maintaining a Clean Core is the concept of extensibility, important for systems expected to have a long lifetime and evolve. For a system to scale and develop along anticipated dimensions, extensibility in software is required, through predictable addition of new functions, capabilities, and support. SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) exemplifies how extensibility supports scalable and flexible cloud solutions. It provides an integration of features and incremented functionalities, such as add-ons and plugins, as well as extensible programming languages, without the need to redesign the underlying infrastructure.

The Journey to Public Cloud with Clean Core

The Clean Core approach prepares for the journey to the Public Cloud, once customers who adopt this strategy reach the integration of services earlier. One of the main offerings of SAP Cloud ALM (Application Lifecycle Management) is the consolidation of Cloud Transport Management service and BTP Deployment DevOps solutions to consistently manage ABAP and BTP extension. Moreover, with Cloud ALM these extensions can be managed without disrupting current operations. With analytics and traceability dashboards, it envisions to track the adherence to clean core criteria throughout a project. This way, enterprises adapt their IT landscapes and modelling capabilities to meet upcoming demands and prepare for future opportunities.

For partners, the benefits include future-proof and cloud-ready solutions, encouraging fit-to-standard compliance through modular innovations. It also simplifies the consumption of out-of-the-box SAP solutions, thereby reducing complexity. For SAP, the total cost of ownership is optimized through lower operational costs for maintaining and upgrading environments. This streamlined, clean core architecture allows for more focused development due to the faster adoption of innovations, creating new opportunities for business transformation and expanding the potential for customer solution development.

Cemented on digital and information technologies, digital transformation leads the way business is done into innovation. It involves an ecosystem of employees, customers, business partners and even competitors, once its impact crosses internal boundaries and spans through business networks. System integration, as one of the faces of digital transformation, is where the Clean Core approach enhances organizational agility and performance. By maintaining a clean core, enterprises ensure their systems are adaptable and up-to-date, nurturing a collaborative environment of value-based relationships, which is fundamental for thriving in a digital ecosystem.

The RISE with SAP Methodology complements the Clean Core strategy and provides a comprehensive framework for digital transformation that involves the following objectives:

  • Outline unused potential in current system
  • Support customers in making decisions which steps to be done in which sequence
  • Prioritize the impact that custom code has on business processes and which highly-individualized ones are causing issues
  • Bridge the gap from analysis to execution by task creation and distribution among the project team

The challenges companies face are related to the impact of migration activities that aim at integration of diverse software landscapes. Yet, they can bring opportunities for improvement, as the cloud capabilities are further used. With the goal to serve as a foundation for cloud architecture and the adoption of public cloud solutions, the methodology supports the migration course through consulting services for implementation, and advice from a trusted single point of contact.

A business digital transformation journey, with a clean core focused approach, gives the flexibility to adapt to changing business requirements with the ability to build innovative extension and functionality decoupled from the core and cloud ready. As part of this transformation, Clean Core is the enabler to future-proofing business supporting our customers to stay competitive and relevant, and that helps ensure organizations use the latest release, minimize modifications, and run with cloud-compliant extensions and customizations.

entry.title: TR isnot getting imported in QA although release in dev although in quality buffer throgh task list
entry.content:
Hi exprets,

TR is not imported into qa although relesed in dev. Its in quality buffer.  the charm status is Sucessfully tested but tr is not imported. which doesnot allow us to move tr in production though task list.

 

Kindly help on this

 

Thanks

madhu

entry.title: Re: 免费销售订单，交货单过账时进费用科目
entry.content: Thank you

entry.title: SAC Error During Package Export
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I'm encountering an issue while exporting a package in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC). The error message I receive is:

Object 'ModelName' failed to export: mPlanId2QueryId[sId] is not iterable (cannot read property undefined)

Has anyone experienced this before or knows what might be causing it?
From what I understand, it seems related to a missing or undefined mapping between plan IDs and query IDs, but the model appears to be correctly configured, and I haven’t made recent changes.
Any insights or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance,
Flavia

entry.title: Re: An error message occurs in the CDS View related to OL...
entry.content: Have you checked and installed the SAP Note 3596268 and 3559329?

entry.title: Re: Is there a walkaround to upload excel with different...
entry.content: You can use the Transpose option inside the uploader transformation step by selecting the Date columns and when we do this there will a two columns added Key and Value which we can rename as Date and measure and map them to the respective dimensions in the next step . By this way we can keep the excel format same and just incorporate these transformation changes inside the uploader step itself.

entry.title: Backoffice advanced search from a related item type
entry.content:
What is the correct approach to add a new advanced search field from a related item type and use it in search operations in backoffice sap commerce?

Example:
Searching for an Order by Carrier, where Carrier is an attribute at the Consignment level

SAP Commerce Cloud SAP Commerce

entry.title: Re: Calculating Results Analysis for Internal Orders
entry.content:
Hi Lucy_gray2,

Its an excellent post. Thanks and appreciated for sharing your knowledge wholeheartedly.

Whereas, I'm confused these two "key points". Please clarify.

Key points to remember about WIP Amount:

 

  • WIP will be calculated only when the Order status is not DLV or TECO.
  • WIP will get canceled if you set the Order's status to DLV or TECO, and then run RA Analysis again.

 

 

*Also please let us know, then how the IO data will be stored in COSB table (or) is there any other table?

KKA1 ⇒ For a single Internal Order. Results analysis is not updated in table COSB automatically.

entry.title: IDOC mapping GSVERF02 --> GSVERF01
entry.content:
Hey,

one of our SAP systems creates outbound IDOCs (Message type GSVERF; basic type GSVERF02). They shall be passed to another system, but mapped into message type SBWAP; basic type GSVERF01.

Source and target IDOCs are standard types, no extensions.

Is there any standard mapping logic we can apply to map the segments?

Or do we have to create our own mapping for each segment ?

Thanks !

entry.title: Is there a limitations in how many receivers I can add per email output ?
entry.content:
Is there a Limitation in how many receiver I can add for business documents  or better is there a Limit ?

Yes, we do have a  hard limit of 100 recipients per e-mail and this is not adjustable

entry.title: Bill of Material API for outbound services
entry.content:
Dear Community,

in our current public cloud project we use a 2-tier approach. In this regards, we would like to distribute bill of materials from public cloud to an OnPremise system using an ODATA API for outbound services.

I was already searching through the Business Accelerator Hub and the communication arrangement settings but I could not find a suitable API or outbound service.

Has anyone of you already had experience with the distribution of BOMs and can describe a solution?

 

Many thanks in advance and kind regards

Talke

entry.title: Unlocking the Future: Accelerated transformation to SAP Cloud ERP Private with SAP’s new service
entry.content:
To remain agile, drive innovation, and outpace competitors, a strategic transformation approach is essential. With this in mind, SAP introduced in April 2025 a pioneering addition to the Cloud ERP Private package: the transformation preparation service.  It is designed to help businesses navigate the complexities of transformation with expert guidance for a tailored strategie.

Facilitating Transformation: The Core Elements
At the core of the service is collaboration, where SAP experts work side-by-side with customers, tailoring a transformation roadmap that meets their unique business needs and goals. This involves setting up essential tools such as SAP Build, and Business Transformation Management (BTM). By introducing a solid solution standardization governance model SAP customers are well-prepared to embark on their transformation journey. Furthermore, the service guides through AI use case examples that not only highlight potential but also illuminate the path forward. These examples showcase benefits that can guide and inspire the project team as they progress.

Transformation preparation service for SAP Business Suite

The transformation preparation service empowers businesses through:

  • Tailored transformation roadmap
    It begins with leveraging the outcomes from the discovery phase like selected SAP Business Suite application packages, business case, value mapping, architecture and roadmap blueprints. These insights guide the creation of the transformation roadmap and set realistic timelines. This approach ensures that every decision is backed by data and aligned with business objectives.
  • Integrated toolchain activation
    Transformation and leveraging new technologies can be challenging, but with SAP's guided setup services, businesses have the support they need. SAP specialists offer guidance for seamless access to the Cloud ERP Private entitlements and the integrated toolchain. This hands-on assistance helps businesses confidently navigate their transformation journey and maximize the value from their investments.
  • Solution standardization governance model
    With the assistance of our experienced experts, establish a robust governance structure and procedures for customizing and extending standards. Ensure smooth implementation while regularly reviewing and updating standards for continuous improvement. This strategy enhances efficiency, quality, and compliance throughout the organization.
  • Use case examples
    Facilitate faster outcomes by leveraging collaborative knowledge transfer and utilizing use case examples for AI scenarios and SAP Build. This approach enhances understanding and accelerates the implementation of effective solutions, driving innovation and growth.

Accelerated Value Delivery
Time is of the essence, and this service is designed to deliver results rapidly. By fostering collaborative knowledge transfer, providing use case examples, and driving continuous improvement, SAP ensures that businesses realize faster outcomes. This focus on accelerated value delivery means businesses can swiftly adapt and thrive in today's competitive market.

With SAP's transformation preparation service, businesses are not just ready for change—they're prepared to drive it. By leveraging SAP's expertise and cutting-edge tools, businesses can navigate the transformation landscape with confidence and clarity, ready to unlock new opportunities and achieve their goals. As the business world continues to evolve, SAP is paving the way for impactful transformation that meets the demands of tomorrow.

In a nutshell
The new transformation preparation service accelerates time-to-value and delivers significant business impact by seamlessly connecting the insights and vision from the solution discovery phase with project preparation and execution effectively optimizing SAP entitlements provided by the SAP Cloud ERP Private package, ensuring businesses are well-equipped to support sustained growth.

More information about the journey to SAP Cloud ERP Private and the RISE with SAP Methodology
www.sap.com/rise-methodology

entry.title: Re: Cloud Connector access to AL11 directory
entry.content: There is no such thing as "AL11 directory". AL11 is simply a frontend to the operating system's file system. So the directory is in the filesystem, and AL11 is only displaying it.

entry.title: Re: Migration Template "Warehouse Stock (new)" - Document Header Text - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Irene,

thank you for replying.

I am referring to the HeaderText field in MIGO, that you were mentioning. This field should be filled with the text "Stock Migration Date XX" as an additional indicator that this posting refers to the stock migration.

Thank you and kind regards

Talke

entry.title: CDS for block function in engagement projecct
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have implemented engagement project and work package concepts. we activated Block function for some projects. 

Kindly help us with CDS for Block function for engagement project.

i can see Block function for enterprise project but there is no luck for engagement project.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Sending PR from Ariba to S/4HANA
entry.content: We are implementing a scenario where the PR is created in Ariba and sent to S/4HANA for the rest of the flow to be done in S/4HANA however Ariba tenant has two ERP systems registered and we need to specify one of them. The creation of PR does not include a field to specify which ERP system. Are there any parameters that need to be configured in Ariba for this specific purpose?

entry.title: Re: Error no. L9029 is raised during qRFC processing from...
entry.content: Hi @AlexPh , nope, I have not a reverse-Kitting scenario with SN, lucky guy 🙂

entry.title: Re: Outbound communication from SAP Public cloud to a Web...
entry.content:
Hi Andrzej,

SAP BC has both, a built-in HTTP server and a built-in JCo. So if the inbound and outbound calls are needed by the same application/scenario, it may indeed be a simplification, if both can be moved inside a SAP BC. Then you can concentrate 100% on the "business logic/functionality" and don't need to write code for the network communication (RFC/HTTP), monitoring, logging, etc.

But of course it depends on the scenario. E.g. if you already have a simple working solution, then adding another component to the picture might unnecessarily complicate things. It's worth it only, if it can be used to replace other components and thus reduce your work and the code for whose maintenance you are responsible. (For example, when writing your own HTTP server from scratch, it is likely it has a few bugs in the beginning, that cost time&effort in trouble-shooting. But when re-using an HTTP server that has been in productive use for 25 years, it can be expected that it works bug-free by now.)
BTW, if you decide to go that way, let me know. A few years ago, I had written a blog with detailed instructions how to easily do Java development on a SAP BC using Eclipse and a standard code revisioning system. It's no longer online, but might be worth it to publish it again here on SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: Fuction of we47
entry.content:
Check out my post for a detailed explanation of  Controlling IDoc Deletion Using WE47: How to Restrict and Unrestrict IDoc Statuses for Archiving 

I hope this helps! Let me know your thoughts or if you have any questions.
Thanks,

Akshay Anil   Linkedin Profile
Technical Consultant, SAP ABAP | BTP | Fiori | Ui5

entry.title: Re: How to Add Calculated Measures from Two Different Mod...
entry.content: @nikhil .. Data Blending is not supported in "Optimized Mode"

entry.title: How to filter column values by description if description concatenated to ID
entry.content:
Hello, community

I created RAP application where I have column product which described in projection view as 

      @EndUserText.label: 'Sales org.'
      @ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'SalesOrgDescription' ]
      _SalesOrg.SalesOrgExtId,

And filtering by ext. ID works perfectly, but if I want to filter by description it is not working because column is ID 🙂
Does somebody have idea how to make a work around, should I change text element to SalesOrgExtId? Maybe you have other ideas I'll be appreciated any

entry.title: Re: The SAP GUI menu does not respond anymore.
entry.content: Hello Peter, You can try a repair of the GUI by going to the SAP GUI "Options" menu "Restore and Cleanup" to see if this helps.

entry.title: Re: Subledger Source Document Type in Journal Entry Query
entry.content:
Hi @kedalenechong ,

Yes. TransType is what you're looking for. A simple CASE statement will deal with it. See a very basic example below. You'll have to adapt it to your needs.

SELECT
	CASE TransType 
		WHEN '13' THEN 'SI'
		WHEN '14' THEN 'CN'
		WHEN '15' THEN 'DN'
		WHEN '18' THEN 'PU'
		WHEN '19' THEN 'PC'
		-- Include the other types based on the TransType (Object Type) list I shared
	END AS 'Origin'
	-- Then the rest of your query...
FROM OJDT

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: The SAP GUI menu does not respond anymore.
entry.content: I must point out however that the 7.70 GUI has been out of support for more than a year now. Plan your GUI rollout to SAP GUI for Windows 8.00 as soon as possible.

entry.title: Re: Error no. L9029 is raised during qRFC processing from...
entry.content: @AlexPh The note https://me.sap.com/notes/3482008/E is unbelievable. Basically it says - we missed some entries in the system table, go ahead and add them. But how, what needs to be added, how to test it - those informations are not there.

entry.title: Library Configuration Settings
entry.content:
Hi,

Is it possible to disable/hide the home page element "Browse Library" of the New Learning Experience.
In the settings section it says :
#This configuration allows the user to launch the catalog 3.0 search page instead of the catalog search results page when clicking search from the Find science tile.
The #default configuration is true, which launches the 3.0 catalog search page
#Catalog search 2.0 is deprecated.
#Configuration options: true is the only valid option
catalogSearch3Enabled=true

So it can not be done here, can it?

Thank you for the help, I highly appreciate it.

Best regards 

Tomasz

entry.title: Re: add/ read attachments of freight order
entry.content:
Hey Manish!

I cannot give you detailied information.

You will have to get the service manager:

DATA(lo_srv_tor) = /bobf/cl_tra_serv_mgr_factory=>get_service_manager( /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_bo_key ).

Define or create an attachment folder and then do action "create file"

        CALL METHOD /scmtms/cl_common_helper=>get_do_keys_4_action
          EXPORTING
            iv_host_bo_key      = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_bo_key
            iv_host_do_node_key = /scmtms/if_tor_c=>sc_node-attachmentfolder
            iv_do_action_key    = /bobf/if_attachment_folder_c=>sc_action-root-create_file
          IMPORTING
            ev_action_key       = lv_action_key.

        lo_srv_tor->do_action(
          EXPORTING
            iv_act_key    = lv_action_key
            it_key        = VALUE #( ( key = iv_atf_key ) )
            is_parameters = REF #( ls_params )
          IMPORTING
            et_failed_key = DATA(lt_failed_key) ).

Regards
Enno

entry.title: Re: How to delete IDOC error records from EDI40
entry.content:
To address this, you might want to check transaction WE47, where you define which IDoc statuses are excluded from archiving. It's possible that status 51 (error in application) is currently excluded, which would prevent those IDocs from being archived. Adjusting the settings there to include status 51 should allow those IDocs to be archived in future runs.

To restrict or unrestrict IDoc statuses, use WE47 to modify the status control settings. This lets you define which statuses are considered valid for actions like deletion or archiving.

Check out my post for a detailed explanation of  Controlling IDoc Deletion Using WE47: How to Restrict and Unrestrict IDoc Statuses for Archiving 

I hope this helps! Let me know your thoughts or if you have any questions.
Thanks,

Akshay Anil   Linkedin Profile
Technical Consultant, SAP ABAP | BTP | Fiori | Ui5

entry.title: Getting ICMENOSESSION error while calling SAP S4 webservice from SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

We are working on scenarios in SAP CPI to call SAP S4 webservice to get the data in request/reply way. There are multiple calls happening to S4 webservice using SOAP 1.x receiver adapter.

FLOW:  SAP CPI <-> SAP SCC <-> SAP S4 (on-prem)

Link to understand the scenario in details: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/modernize-rfc-receiver.html

In S4, webservice is linked to function module based on the request payload we are sending from CPI function module is getting executed based on the logic written in it then giving back the response immediately.

Problem statement:

  • Webservice calls are getting executed successfully for few initial calls. Some of the execution whole integration is getting executed successfully without failure.
    But sometimes suddenly getting failed with error: "org.apache.cxf.interceptor.Fault: Could not send Message., cause: org.apache.cxf.transport.http.HTTPException: HTTP response '400: Bad Request. <!-- This error page was generated by ICM (-)! -->
    <!-- Error code: ICMENOSESSION "
  • We are not able to see any logs in SRT_MONI or SXMB_MONI about this failure in S4. Also tried to check in SRT_UTIL but no luck.

From our end we have tried to execute the integration by doing multiple changes:

  • Made HTTP session reuse 'none' in CPI and enableSession parameter false in S4 wsdl setting. (KBA:

    https://me.sap.com/notes/0003419590)

  • Also tried to remove allow chunking in SAP CPI SOAP adapter configuration.
  • All cases we are throwing same error.

Please suggest further if you also encountered similar kind of issues. let me know possible resolution of this issue.

Regards,

Souvik

entry.title: Mass Upload for features and User stories in Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Hi 

I would like to know if SAP has a inbuilt functionality of mass uploading features as well as user stories . what application would you refer to ? Also, Can i use app "Migrate your Data" to upload the features and user stories in the instance of Cloud ALM, which we have procured? 

Regards

Kanishak

Technical Consultant, SAP ABAP | BTP | Fiori | Ui5

entry.title: Re: AP Invoices content repository
entry.content: Since enabling SAP_COM_0109 often requires SAP involvement, open an SAP incident under component CA-GT-ALD or LO-IO-AL (depending on use case), requesting activation for your communication scenario.

entry.title: Re: Approval Strategy for Sales Order
entry.content:
Hello @Tural-Hajiyev 

There is no such a functionality as sales order release strategy in standard. You could build a custom one around user Status Management. User statuses could be used to model approval steps. The topic has already been discussed here - Google it.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Advanced Variant Configuration
entry.content: Slightly related question: when using aVC, is it still possible to use ALE to distribute VC data, like in the 'old' ECC (CHRMAS, CLSMAS etc)?

entry.title: Print document or raw data sheet from SAP which predefined
entry.content:
i want print raw data sheet from SAP which having predefined parameters ( example: length, width,height,color ) and document number 

Sr.Length Width Height Color
1    
2    
3    
4

entry.title: Different Customization options in evaluation vs. implementation projects ?
entry.content:
According to the documentation for the partner TDD instance we have set up the respective CBC workspaces/projects as "evaluation"-type projects. When we start to get into customization, we see that cross modules there are different behaviors in terms of customization flexibility. By example a SD order type CANNOT be copied to a customer specific order type, but in FI a document type CAN be copied to a customer specific document type.

Our uncertainty is, if this behavior has something to do with the project type chosen (evaluation vs. implementation) for the respective CBC workspace ? Would an implementation project allow to copy and maintain more customization settings then an evaluation project ? And if yes, is there a kind of register that lists the customization topics that are inflexible in evaluation projects vs. that are flexible in implementation projects ?

entry.title: Re: How to Add Calculated Measures from Two Different Mod...
entry.content: Yeah I had that feeling that's why asked you to check if blending is possible. Assuming the DS Analytical model is consumed live in SAC, LINK formula option also might not exist. So looks like it would not be possible. Only option is you create another AM in DS where you combine both data.

entry.title: Drill-Down in SAP ByD Excel Add-in
entry.content:
Hello,

Does Drill-Down feature available in SAP ByD Excel Add-in? Couldn't find any answer on web.

Kind Regards

entry.title: Story report - access and filtering
entry.content:
I'm still getting my head around story reports so bear with me here. 

If we create a dashboard for managers to see their teams info then thats easy, thats fine, I've no problems there.

However I'm trying to create story reports with summaries of information for the whole business for certain managers but when I share with the manager they can only see their direct team on the report instead of the whole company. 

I was told to play with scope filtering but this doesn't seem to help. I don't know much about role based permissions etc and am not particularly techy so does anyone have any suggestions I can use to explain to the person in my team that does deal with SF permissions... that person doesn't have anything to do with Report Stories so I want to translate the issue into the right terminology for them.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Create custom tab in XD02/XD03 transaction
entry.content: How do I add the custom tab in the end ?

entry.title: CDS view entity : how to use domain value in WHERE clause
entry.content:
Hello,

A value of an ABAP domain can be used in the WHERE of the ancient CDS view.

For example in the CDS view I_PurchaseOrderItemPurgIssue, the value 'F' of domain BSTYP is used : view I_PurchaseOrderItemPurgIssue is not a view entity

But it is no more allowed if the CDS view is defined as view entity : View ZTEST_EKKO is defined as view entity

 

 

How can we test a domain value if the view is of type view entity ?

My SAP version is : ABAP 7.56 (SAP S/4HANA 2021)

 

 

Chaouki

entry.title: Create Sales Order (Manage Sales Order V2) - Product Proposal not working
entry.content:
Dear guys,

we want to use the Manage Sales Order V2 in order to create new sales order using the product proposal feature.

Therefore we have configured the product proposal as described here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a376cd9ea00d476b96f18dea1247e6a5/3f335e9dbdde405ba0e456031c4daa6a.html?locale=en-US

  • Maintain Algorithm Parameters for Intelligent Product Proposal

  • Maintain Backgr. Procedure Determination for Intelligent Product Proposal

  • Maintain Online Procedure Determination for Product Proposal

The mentioned API is also configured and works fine but it isn't triggered at all:
API_INTELLIGENTPRODUCTPROPOSAL_SRV

Additionally we created an entry in Fiori App "Manage Sales Item Proposal" and assigned it to the vendor number.

In VA01 everything works fine but in the Fiori app the products are not proposed - the button "Propose Items" is greyed out.

Br
SC

entry.title: Customize request for class tab
entry.content:
Hi,

For all ILT courses, when user clicks on 'Request a class' option we can view need by date, preferred region, preferred location and comments.

Do we have options to customize it like adding custom links. other labels any options.

Regards,
Ramya

entry.title: Watermark in sap webi report
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I have a requirement to automatically include specific elements in all Web Intelligence (WebI) reports created by users, particularly during ad-hoc report creation. Each report page should include the following by default:

  1. A watermark (please refer to the attached image for reference)

  2. The last data refresh date

  3. Page numbers

Ideally, the watermark (as shown in below pic) should be visible during design time. However, it is acceptable if it appears at least during export or printing.

If this functionality is not natively supported, could you please advise whether a custom SDK-based solution can help achieve this?

Regards,

Vijai Muniraj

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori launchpad - save as tile functionality
entry.content: Hi Matjaz - what solution are you using SAP Fiori launchpad on ? That's a VERY old help reference and yet your screenshot looks recent... so it's probably not the correct help. Can you please get the details from the User Actions (top rightmost MM icon in your screenshot) > About

entry.title: Re: Period is open in MM but still is not allowing to pos...
entry.content: For MIGO, you should not check OB52.  Is the Company Code in MMRV you shared is same in MIGO also ?

entry.title: Re: How to obtain Packing Time Stamp on Outbound Delivery...
entry.content: Thanks Ajit. Is there any way to pick this time stamp and place it at the Packing Status DPC ? and also is it possible to show Packing status as "completed" if the Pack HU is created

entry.title: Re: Recuperar mi usuario S...
entry.content:
Hi @jachacon,
To help us to understand your query and to ensure that everyone in the SAP Learning Group can follow we kindly ask you to communicate in English - Would you mind to reword your post?
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Position-Specific Competencies in Job Profile Builder – How Are They Utilized Across Module
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In our SAP SuccessFactors implementation, we are using Job Profile Builder (JPB) where competencies and skills are defined at the Job Role level.

When we navigate from Job Code → Position, we notice that the linked position inherits competencies and skills from the Job Role. Additionally, we have the option to add position-specific competencies and skills, which is quite useful for regional role variations.

For example:

  • Finance Controller – Middle East may require: "Knowledge of Islamic Finance", "Arabic Language Proficiency".

  • Finance Controller – Europe may require: "EU Taxation", "Fluency in French/German".

These variations make sense from a business standpoint. However, I would like to understand the functional use of these position-level competencies.

Specific Questions:

  • Once position-specific competencies are added, will they reflect in:

    • Performance Management forms (PM Forms)?

    • Succession Planning views (Job Role Details)?

    • Career Worksheet competency gap analysis?

  • Or are only Job Role-linked competencies utilized across the above modules?

  • What are the best practices or common use cases for defining competencies at the position level?

So far, we only see Job Role competencies being pulled into these modules.

Looking forward to your insights and guidance.

Thanks & Regards,
Namsheed

entry.title: Re: How t o do a test the Field “Invoice dates”?
entry.content:
My take is slightly different

For delivery based billing, the delivery looks at the pattern of working days (within invoice days calendar) and picks the next billing date.  All good.

For order based billing (or at least when I was testing order based billing) it tends to ignore this, and just takes the date you type in.

entry.title: material master creation restriction based on the material type in public cloud
entry.content: material master creation restriction based on the material type in public cloud

entry.title: Re: No certification attempts (employee edition) assigned...
entry.content:
Hi @Sara_Riolobos 

Please create a case 
When raising an inquiry, include detailed information in the description to help our team assist you better.

Kind regards
Margit
